summary: Device Profile Library feature testing completed. Backend: 28/28 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components working correctly - 10 profile cards displayed, profile modal with edit mode, fingerprint tester, search/filter functionality. Web Console V4 regression: 6/6 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: device_profiles/__init__.py: PROFILES list contains 10 seed profiles with correct structure
device_profiles/__init__.py: fingerprint() function correctly matches by sysObjectID prefix (score 100) and sysDescr regex (score 40)
device_profiles/__init__.py: SEED_VERSION = 1 for tracking profile updates
routes/device_profiles.py: GET /api/device-profiles returns seed_version, count=10, profiles array
routes/device_profiles.py: GET /api/device-profiles/{key} returns effective profile (seed + overrides)
routes/device_profiles.py: POST /api/device-profiles/fingerprint correctly returns matched, confidence, profile
routes/device_profiles.py: PUT /api/device-profiles/{key}/override requires admin role (403 for viewer)
routes/device_profiles.py: DELETE /api/device-profiles/{key}/override removes override and resets _has_overrides
routes/device_profiles.py: POST /api/device-profiles/apply updates managed_devices and device_poll_status
routes/device_profiles.py: GET /api/device-profiles/list/vendors returns 10 items for dropdown
routes/connector.py: Auto-classify hook at line ~650 calls fingerprint() on new devices
DeviceProfilesPage.js: Correctly loads 10 profile cards with data-testid='profile-card-{key}'
DeviceProfilesPage.js: ProfileDetailModal shows fingerprint rules, SNMP, web_console, thresholds, OIDs
DeviceProfilesPage.js: Edit mode reveals JSON textareas + save-override-btn
DeviceProfilesPage.js: FingerprintTesterModal calls /api/device-profiles/fingerprint and shows result
Layout.js: Device Profiles nav item in Amministrazione section with Cpu icon
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with existing profiles and fingerprint matching
context_for_next_testing_agent: Device Profile Library feature fully tested. All 10 seed profiles (hp_procurve, synology_dsm, qnap_qts, fortinet_fortigate, unifi, zyxel_usg, apc_ups, cisco_catalyst, dell_idrac, generic_snmp) are present and correctly structured. Fingerprint matching works with high confidence for OID prefix matches and medium confidence for sysDescr regex matches. Override functionality requires admin role. Frontend page at /device-profiles shows all profiles with search/filter, modal detail view, edit mode, and fingerprint tester. Web Console V4 regression tests pass.

override_api.nonexistent_404: PASS - override on nonexistent profile returns 404

profile_specific_details.synology_api_endpoints: PASS - has login, system_info, storage, hyper_backup
